contact_points.description: On the upper part of the box
contact_points.usage: Used to grasp the box with the left arm.

contact_points.description: On the lower part of the box
contact_points.usage: Used to handover the box with the right arm.

functional_points.description: On the bottom of the block
functional_points.usage: Used to place the block on table or other surfaces.

functional_points.description: On the top of the block
functional_points.usage: Used to indicate the position of other objects when they come into contact with the block.
